orchestrator.description: Senior full-stack architect. Plans, delegates, and reviews.

backend-dev.description: API specialist. Builds routes, DB schemas, and middleware.

content-writer.description: Creates MDX blog posts with rich frontmatter.

build-blog.description: Scaffold and build a complete Next.js blog
build-blog.prompt: Build a production-ready Next.js 14 blog called {name} with {theme} theme. Use app router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS. Delegate work to sub-agents.
